requirement_topic.en: EPC Grid Connection - 230/400 V, 50 Hz and Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: EPC电网接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: EPC電網接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及項目驗收

summary.en: Samoa's low-voltage supply is commonly 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Electric Power Corporation (EPC) is the state electricity utility and the practical project gate for grid-connected charging loads. EV charger projects should be checked for available supply capacity, metering, protection coordination, earthing, voltage drop, harmonic injection, load management, commissioning evidence, and fit with Samoa's high renewable-energy direction. Samoa has the same 50 Hz frequency as China, but the 230/400 V nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline and must be covered by the charger rating and protection settings.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚低压供电通常为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。Electric Power Corporation（EPC）是国有电力公用事业机构，也是并网充电负载的实务项目关口。电动汽车充电项目应核查可用供电容量、计量、保护配合、接地、电压降、谐波注入、负载管理、调试证据，以及与萨摩亚高比例可再生能源方向的适配性。50 Hz频率与中国相同，但230/400 V标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线，必须由充电桩额定值和保护设置覆盖。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞低壓供電通常為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。Electric Power Corporation（EPC）是國有電力公用事業機構，也是併網充電負載的實務項目關口。電動汽車充電項目應核查可用供電容量、計量、保護配合、接地、電壓降、諧波注入、負載管理、調試證據，以及與薩摩亞高比例可再生能源方向的適配性。50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但230/400 V標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線，必須由充電樁額定值和保護設置覆蓋。

standards_or_laws: Electric Power Corporation (EPC) service and connection requirements
Office of the Regulator (OOTR) electricity-sector oversight
IEC 61000 series - electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 - EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Samoa has the same 50 Hz frequency as China but a different nominal voltage at 230/400 V, so China domestic ratings and protection settings cannot be assumed to transfer without confirmation.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。萨摩亚标称频率相同，但标称电压为230/400 V，与中国不同，因此不能假定中国国内额定值和保护设置无需确认即可适用。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。薩摩亞標稱頻率相同，但標稱電壓為230/400 V，與中國不同，因此不能假定中國國內額定值和保護設置無需確認即可適用。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm input-voltage range, over/under-voltage thresholds, breaker and RCD ratings, cable sizing, heat dissipation, harmonic data, and weak-grid behaviour for Samoa's 230/400 V, 50 Hz system. The frequency is not the gap; the voltage delta, EPC project acceptance, renewable-heavy island-grid conditions, and tropical coastal exposure are the practical gaps. A China 220/380 V configuration without documented 230/400 V acceptance is not Samoa grid-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认输入电压范围、过/欠压阈值、断路器和RCD额定值、电缆选型、散热能力、谐波数据及弱电网行为适用于萨摩亚230/400 V、50 Hz系统。频率不是差距；电压差异、EPC项目验收、高比例可再生能源岛国电网条件及热带沿海暴露才是实务差距。未形成230/400 V适用文件的中国220/380 V配置不满足萨摩亚并网准备要求。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認輸入電壓範圍、過/欠壓閾值、斷路器和RCD額定值、電纜選型、散熱能力、諧波數據及弱電網行為適用於薩摩亞230/400 V、50 Hz系統。頻率不是差距；電壓差異、EPC項目驗收、高比例可再生能源島國電網條件及熱帶沿海暴露才是實務差距。未形成230/400 V適用文件的中國220/380 V配置不滿足薩摩亞併網準備要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level - grid-connected charger installations require EPC connection review, electrical installation compliance, and commissioning acceptance as applicable
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an EPC approval substitute; Samoa 230/400 V ratings must be documented

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Samoa uses the same 50 Hz frequency as China but a different 230/400 V nominal voltage. Treat voltage range, protection settings, EPC connection acceptance, weak-grid performance, and site commissioning as required Samoa-specific checks before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 萨摩亚与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压为不同的230/400 V。出货或安装前，应将电压范围、保护设置、EPC接入验收、弱电网性能和现场调试作为萨摩亚专门核查项处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 薩摩亞與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓為不同的230/400 V。出貨或安裝前，應將電壓範圍、保護設置、EPC接入驗收、弱電網性能和現場調試作為薩摩亞專門核查項處理。
